subject: Dedenne, a small round orange and brown electric rodent, leaping with sparks of electricity around it
description: Dedenne is caught mid-leap in a dynamic pose, its round orange body with brown ear patches and long thin whisker-antennae visible clearly. Yellow-white electricity sparks and glowing effects surround the creature, suggesting it is charging or discharging power. The background is an energetic blur of warm tones and light flares consistent with an indoor or abstract setting. The art style is lively and chibi-adjacent, emphasizing the creature's cute-but-electric character.
foreground: Dedenne leaping with electricity sparks surrounding it
background: Warm light-toned blur with electricity flares
